2606.03657.title: Diagnosing Knowledge Gaps in LLM Tool Use: An Agentic Benchmark for Novel API Acquisition
2606.03657.paper_summary: Large language models for code generation often need to use APIs that are absent from their pretraining data. This requires more than recalling a function name: models must coordinate signatures, module paths, input-output contracts, semantics, and executable usage patterns. Existing novel-API benchmarks are typically static, rely on coarse pass/fail metrics, or use synthetic APIs that may not reflect real library evolution. We introduce NovelAPIBench, a fully automated dynamic benchmark that, for any base model and target library, discovers novel APIs, extracts decomposed knowledge bundles, generates executable coding tasks, and assigns failed samples to six diagnostic categories. Across about 1.9K tasks, four base models, and five domains, we compare knowledge injected through retrieval with knowledge internalized through parametric adaptation. We find that knowledge components are not interchangeable: usage examples are the strongest standalone signal, while the best two-component setting pairs signatures with either mechanisms or examples depending on the domain and backbone. Adding more context, especially source code, can hurt by increasing import-path errors. Parametric adaptation also does not replace retrieval once external knowledge is removed; rather, fine-tuning mainly teaches models how to use provided bundles, and this ability transfers to held-out libraries. These results suggest that retrieval and tuning play complementary roles: retrieval supplies volatile API content, while tuning improves procedural integration.
2606.03657.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在代碼生成中常常需要使用其預訓練數據中缺失的 API。這不僅僅是回憶函數名稱：模型必須協調簽名、模塊路徑、輸入輸出契約、語義和可執行使用模式。現有的新 API 基準通常是靜態的，依賴於粗略的通過/失敗指標，或使用可能不反映真實庫演變的合成 API。我們介紹 NovelAPIBench，一個完全自動化的動態基準，對於任何基礎模型和目標庫，發現新 API，提取分解的知識包，生成可執行的編碼任務，並將失敗的樣本分配到六個診斷類別。在大約 1.9K 任務、四個基礎模型和五個領域中，我們比較通過檢索注入的知識與通過參數適應內化的知識。我們發現知識組件並不是可以互換的：使用示例是最強的獨立信號，而最佳的兩組件設置根據領域和骨幹將簽名與機制或示例配對。增加更多上下文，特別是源代碼，可能會因增加導入路徑錯誤而造成損害。一旦移除外部知識，參數適應也無法替代檢索；相反，微調主要教會模型如何使用提供的包，這種能力會轉移到保留的庫中。這些結果表明，檢索和調整扮演互補的角色：檢索提供不穩定的 API 內容，而調整改善程序整合。
2606.03657.author: Jinnuo Liu et.al.
2606.03657.authors: Jinnuo Liu, Yue Peng, Jinhan Niu, Hongyi Wen
